title: Semantic Compression
impact: Improves search quality through normalized observations with coreference resolution

observationQuality.current: Raw text with pronouns and relative dates

searchMatching.current: May miss matches due to pronoun usage
searchMatching.target: Better matching via explicit entity names

tasks.title: Create ObservationNormalizer Class
tasks.description: Create normalizer for coreference resolution and temporal anchoring of observations.

implementation.purpose: Transform observations to be self-contained facts by resolving pronouns to entity names and converting relative dates to absolute dates.

stepByStep.details: Create the new file in the features directory

stepByStep.code:
/**
 * Observation Normalizer
 *
 * Phase 11: Transforms observations to be self-contained facts
 * through coreference resolution and temporal anchoring.
 *
 * @module features/ObservationNormalizer
 */

import type { Entity } from '../types/index.js';

acceptanceCriteria: resolveCoreferences replaces pronouns with entity names
anchorTimestamps converts relative dates to absolute

tasks.title: Create KeywordExtractor Class
tasks.description: Create dedicated keyword extractor for lexical layer enhancement with importance scoring.

implementation.purpose: Extract and score keywords from text to enhance lexical search layer. Includes TF-IDF-like importance scoring.
keyDecisions: Importance scoring based on position and frequency

tasks.title: Add normalize_observations MCP Tool
tasks.description: Add MCP tool for observation normalization.

implementation.purpose: Expose observation normalization capability via MCP for improving search quality.
keyDecisions: Can normalize single entity or all entities

stepByStep.action: Add import and handler to toolHandlers.ts

acceptanceCriteria: Handler normalizes single entity or all entities

tasks.title: Create Semantic Compression Unit Tests
tasks.description: Create unit tests for ObservationNormalizer and KeywordExtractor.

implementation.purpose: Verify normalization correctly resolves coreferences and anchors timestamps.
keyDecisions: Test pronoun resolution for different genders
Test temporal anchoring for various patterns

successCriteria: All four tasks completed with passing tests
ObservationNormalizer resolves pronouns and anchors dates
notes: Coreference resolution uses heuristics based on entity name patterns
More sophisticated NLP can be added later without API changes
Temporal anchoring requires reference date for accuracy
Normalization can be persisted to improve future searches
